name: io.github.dKosarevsky/albu-mcp
title: AlbumentationsX MCP
description: AlbumentationsX MCP for batch previews, compare preview runs, feedback, scoring, and reports.

environmentVariables.name: ALBU_MCP_ALLOWED_ROOTS
environmentVariables.description: Optional os.pathsep-separated allowlist of local roots that preview inputs and masks may be read from.

environmentVariables.name: ALBU_MCP_ARTIFACT_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Optional local directory where generated preview artifacts and manifests are written.

environmentVariables.name: ALBU_MCP_MAX_PREVIEW_RUNS
environmentVariables.description: Optional retention limit for indexed preview runs. Defaults to 100.
